{{Short description|Italian film festival in 2013}} {{Use dmy dates|date=May 2020}} {{Infobox Film festival |name = 70th Venice International Film Festival |image = VeniceFilmFestival70poster.jpg |caption = Festival poster |opening = ''[[Gravity (2013 film)|Gravity]]'' |closing = ''[[Amazonia (film)|Amazonia]]'' |location = [[Venice]], [[Italy]] |founded = 1932 |awards = [[Golden Lion]]:
''[[Sacro GRA]]'' |artistic_director= [[Alberto Barbera]] |host = [[Eva Riccobono]] |number = |date = 28 August – 7 September 2013 |website = {{URL|http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/}} | chronology = Venice Film Festival | preceded_by = [[69th Venice International Film Festival|69th]] | followed_by = [[71st Venice International Film Festival|71st]] }} The '''70th annual [[Venice Film Festival|Venice International Film Festival]]''', was held from 28 August to 7 September 2013, at [[Venice Lido]] in [[Italy]].{{cite web |url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/70th-festival/line-up/index.html |title=70th Venice International Film Festival Line-up |work=labiennale.org |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131013114658/http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/70th-festival/line-up/index.html |archive-date=13 October 2013 }} Italian filmmaker [[Bernardo Bertolucci]] was the jury president for the main competition. He was previously the president of the jury at the 40th edition in 1983.{{cite web |title=Bernardo Bertolucci President of the international Jury of the Venezia 70 Competition |url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/news/09-05.html |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131004201251/http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/news/09-05.html |archive-date=4 October 2013 |work=labiennale.org}}{{cite web |date=9 May 2013 |title=Bernardo Bertolucci To Head 70th Venice Film Festival Jury |url=http://www.indiewire.com/article/bernardo-bertulocci-to-head-venice-jury |work=Indiewire}} Italian actress [[Eva Riccobono]] hosted the opening and closing nights of the festival.{{cite web |title=Eva Riccobono In Armani Privé – 70th Venice International Film Festival Photocall |url=http://www.redcarpet-fashionawards.com/2013/08/28/eva-riccobono-in-armani-prive-70th-venice-international-film-festival-photocall/ |access-date=30 July 2013 |work=redcarpet-fashionawards.com}} The [[Golden Lion]] was awarded to ''[[Sacro GRA]]'' by [[Gianfranco Rosi (director)|Gianfranco Rosi]], marking the first documentary film to ever win it.{{cite news|last=Franck Nouchi|title=Pour la première fois, le Lion d'or à Venise récompense un documentaire|url=http://www.lemonde.fr/culture/article/2013/09/08/un-lion-d-or-venitien-pour-un-documentaire-romain_3473005_3246.html|access-date=8 September 2013|newspaper=Le Monde|date=8 September 2013}}{{cite news|title=Vince l'Italia: Leone d'oro a "Sacro GRA"|url=http://www.repubblica.it/speciali/cinema/venezia/edizione2013/2013/09/07/news/venezia_vincitore-66075620/?ref=HRER3-1|access-date=7 September 2013|newspaper=La Repubblica|date=7 September 2013}}{{cite news |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/entertainment-arts-24006969 |title=Italian documentary Sacro GRA wins Golden Lion |date=8 September 2013 |work=BBC News}} American filmmaker [[William Friedkin]] received the [[Golden Lion for Lifetime Achievement]] during the festival.{{cite news |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/entertainment-arts-22387152 |title=William Friedkin to receive Venice honour|work=BBC News | date=2 May 2013}} The festival opened with ''[[Gravity (2013 film)|Gravity]]'' by [[Alfonso Cuarón]],{{cite news |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/entertainment-arts-23158374 |title=George Clooney and Sandra Bullock to open Venice film festival |work=BBC News | date=3 July 2013}} and closed with ''[[Amazonia (film)|Amazonia]]'' by Thierry Ragobert. ==Juries== === Main competition (''Venezia 70'') === * [[Bernardo Bertolucci]], Italian filmmaker - Jury President{{Cite web|url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/70th-festival/70/juries-awards.html |title=International Juries of the 70th Venice Film Festival |work=labiennale.org |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130922015842/http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/70th-festival/juries/ |archive-date=22 September 2013 }} * [[Andrea Arnold]], English filmmaker * [[Renato Berta]], Swiss-France director of photography * [[Carrie Fisher]], American actress, screenwriter and novelist * [[Martina Gedeck]], German actress * [[Jiang Wen]], Chinese actor and director * [[Pablo Larraín]], Chilean filmmaker * [[Virginie Ledoyen]], French actress * [[Ryuichi Sakamoto]], Japanese composer === ''[[Orizzonti]]'' === * [[Paul Schrader]], American screenwriter, film director and critic - Jury President * [[Catherine Corsini]], French filmmaker, screenwriter and actress * [[Leonardo Di Costanzo]], Italian director, screenwriter and cinematographer * [[Golshifteh Farahani]], Iranian actress, musician and singer * [[Frédéric Fonteyne]], Belgian film director * [[Kseniya Rappoport]], Russian actress * [[Amr Waked]], Egyptian actor === Opera Prima (Venice Award for a Debut Film) === * [[Haifaa Al Mansour]], Saudi Arabian filmmaker - Jury President * [[Amat Escalante]], Mexican filmmaker, producer * [[Aleksei Yuryevich German|Alexej German Jr.]], Russian filmmaker * [[Geoffrey Gilmore]], director of [[Tribeca Festival|Tribeca Film Festival]] * [[Ariane Labed]], Greek-French actress * [[Maria Sole Tognazzi]], Italian film director ==Official Sections== Future Reloaded'' == Under the project title ''Venice 70 - Future Reloaded'', 70 top film directors were each invited to make a 60-90 second short film, as "both a collective tribute to the Festival (the first festival in the world to reach the milestone of 70 editions) and a reflection on the future of cinema".{{cite web|title=Venice Film Festival 70 - Future Reloaded|url=http://en.venezia.net/26/08/2013/venice-film-festival-2013-future-reloaded.html|publisher=Venezia.net|access-date=5 March 2018}}{{cite web|last1=Aguilar|first1=Carlos|title=Venezia 70 Future Reloaded Shorts|url=http://www.indiewire.com/2013/10/venezia-70-future-reloaded-shorts-169358/|publisher=Indiewire|access-date=5 March 2018|date=7 October 2013}}{{cite web|url=https://www.imdb.com/title/tt3064438/ |title=Venice 70: Future Reloaded (2013) |work=IMDb |access-date=5 April 2018}} ==Independent Sections== ===Venice International Film Critics' Week=== The following films were selected for the Critics' Week:{{Cite web |url=http://www.sicvenezia.it/edizione/28-settimana-internazionale-della-critica/?lang=en |title=28th International Film Critics' Week |work=sicvenezia.it |access-date=10 April 2018 |archive-date=11 April 2018 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180411174212/http://www.sicvenezia.it/edizione/28-settimana-internazionale-della-critica/?lang=en |url-status=dead }}{{Cite web |url=http://www.sicvenezia.it/1897/edizione-2013/news-2013/svelati-i-film-delledizione-2013/?lang=en |title=Line-up 2013 unveiled |work=sicvenezia.it |access-date=10 April 2018 |archive-date=11 April 2018 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180411111546/http://www.sicvenezia.it/1897/edizione-2013/news-2013/svelati-i-film-delledizione-2013/?lang=en |url-status=dead }} {| class="wikitable" style="width:95%; margin-bottom:0px" |- !
